creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Laurence 'GreenReaper' Parry from comment #0)

Though it does not freeze during build on my box or poudriere jail, I've committed a patch in r428938.

Regarding the libpsl shlib version, upstream fixed it in 0.16.1. See pkg-plist changes in [1] and [2].

[1] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=428433
[2] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=428728
